history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A first-person perspective shot from inside a vehicle, looking out at a mining or construction site. The driver, wearing a white MSA hard hat, an orange and yellow high-visibility vest over a light blue long-sleeved shirt, and blue jeans, is visible from the back. A face mask is worn. The interior of the vehicle shows a steering wheel, dashboard with a radio and air conditioning controls, a rearview mirror, and part of the passenger seat. The rearview mirror reflects the face of the driver wearing a white face mask and the scene outside. Through the windshield, a large yellow mining truck is prominent in the middle ground, driving on a dirt road. The background features a vast, excavated landscape with piles of earth and some vegetation. The lighting appears to be natural daylight, casting a slightly overcast or diffused light over the scene. The color palette is dominated by earthy tones of brown and grey from the terrain, contrasted by the bright yellow of the truck and the orange and yellow of the safety vest. The mood is one of operational activity in an industrial or resource extraction setting. The style is realistic, as if captured by a standard camera.
